philosophy: Use restrained hierarchy and credible spacing to make business status trustworthy at first glance.

typography.fontFamily: "Source Han Sans SC", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif
typography.caption: 12px/1.5/400

components.hero: Split hero with one summary column and one metrics/status column.
components.kpiCard: Use clear value-first layout with concise labels and restrained color.
components.list: Keep filters compact and reserve emphasis for status and overdue signals.
components.detail: Place object identity, status and next actions above the fold.
components.form: Group fields into 2-3 sections and keep validation messages explicit.
components.timeline: Use subtle vertical rhythm and one clear active state.
